MINI MINUTES: Line 1
Judge Pro Tem: Norman Nayfach, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Cheryl Willis
Attorney Nichole Santiago for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ruby Chatman is present, appears late at 2:15 pm, in Pro Per.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of November 30, 2015 is vacated. (501/jpt)
